name: stoa-js
description: StoaChain TypeScript stack — workspace root for @stoachain/kadena-stoic-legacy (vendored @kadena/*), @stoachain/stoa-core (chain-generic foundation), @stoachain/ouronet-core (Ouronet protocol business logic), and @stoachain/ouronet-codex (modular React Codex layer for consumer apps).

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@stoachain/kadena-stoic-legacy && npm run build --workspace=@stoachain/stoa-core && npm run build --workspace=@stoachain/ouronet-core && npm run build --workspace=@stoachain/ouronet-codex
